Wow! Pretty cool

Howdy!! Welcome to my blog.

My name is Eugene and I am currently a master's student in Public Health at McGill University. I like to see the result of my work right away.... I like numbers and statistics, therefore registering in my masters program, the combination of these both ....my enrollment in the public health program. In my first year of the program, I remember writing my first line code in R in the fall of 2021. I love numbers and statistics. Oh wow..I felt like I have the world, haha. Ever since I have been looking for ways to learn new tools. Learn more about me! that m

I am interested in the intersection of health and data science, so on this blog, I will be writing about my interests, and what I am up to. In this blog, I will be writing about data science, personal projects, and interesting books I am reading.
